title: Dozens of Medical Workers Killed as Israel Hits Lebanon
summary_full: Lebanese health officials say that 31 health workers have been killed by Israeli strikes. Israel claimed, without evidence, that Hezbollah has been using ambulances and medical facilities.
summary_public: Lebanese health officials say that 31 health workers have been killed by Israeli strikes. Israel claimed, without evidence, that Hezbollah has been using ambulances and medical facilities.

LB.label: negative
LB.evidence: Lebanese health officials say that 31 health workers have been killed
